name: The Sunken Crypt
description: A vast network of burial chambers, long since submerged by dark water and reclaimed by the undead. The air reeks of rot and old magic. Drowned priests walk its flooded halls, and something ancient stirs in the deepest chamber.

narrative.theme_description: The Sunken Crypt was once a sacred burial site for a powerful priestly order. When the underground springs flooded the lower vaults centuries ago, the priests were trapped below. Their spirits, denied peaceful rest, were ensnared by a Lich who now rules from the deepest chamber.

room_text_pool.text: Water seeps through cracks in the stone ceiling, dripping into stagnant pools that smell of sulfur.
Rows of stone sarcophagi line the walls, their lids askew. You sense you are not alone.
Ancient runes glow faintly on the walls — burial rites carved by long-dead priests.
A pristine altar sits untouched amidst the decay. An offering bowl still holds dried flowers.
Bones crunch underfoot. The remains of adventurers who came before you.
A rotted bookshelf holds scrolls, most disintegrated beyond reading. One remains intact.
The darkness here feels alive. Shadows move at the edge of your torchlight.
Phosphorescent fungi cast an eerie green glow over the flooded floor.
A gust of cold air rushes past you, carrying the faint sound of weeping.
The walls here are scorched black — some old battle left its mark. A chest sits in the corner.

lore_pool: A carved stone tablet reads: 'Here lies the Order of the Drowned Flame. May the waters carry their spirits to rest.'
A waterlogged journal entry: 'Day 34 below. The water keeps rising. We cannot leave — something holds the doors shut from within.'
Etched into a wall in desperate scratches: 'The Lich stole our souls. Our bodies walk but we are not inside them.'
A crumbling notice on a pillar: 'By order of the Lich King: All trespassers shall be added to his army.'
A child's drawing wedged in a crevice — stick figures holding hands, one wearing a crown. The crowned figure has X's for eyes.
